data.title: Mattr Announces Closing of Credit Facility Extension
data.description: Toronto-based company Mattr Corp. has recently finalized an amendment to its credit facility with major financial institutions. The amendment, led by The Toronto-Dominion Bank and National Bank of Canada, along with Royal Bank of Canada, JP Morgan Chase Bank, Export Development Canada, and ATB Financial has extended the US$300 million senior secured revolving facility until October 2030.

data.title: JetBlue increases checked bag fees to $59 for one domestic flight, impacting other carriers due to rising fuel costs.
data.description: With the current charge of up to $59 for one checked bag on domestic flights, the airline is positioning itself as a potential influencer within the industry. The ongoing conflict in Iran has put strain on other carriers, making the airline's pricing strategy all the more significant.

data.title: Hershey's vows to make real chocolate after criticism, including complaints from a descendant of the Reese's creator.
data.description: After receiving numerous complaints from the grandson of the inventor of Reese’s Peanut Butter Cup and other dissatisfied consumers, a change has been implemented.

data.title: Wine, Art, Verona: Vinitaly 2026 According To Pasqua Wines
data.description: A winery in Verona is embracing innovation by incorporating artistic elements into its communication, with a diverse range of events and partnerships across the city. Located in Verona, Italy, this winery made headlines on April 2, 2026, as it revealed its role as a partner of the 2026 Verona Summer Theater festival. The winery's approach merges the language of art with its offerings, contributing to a dynamic cultural landscape in the city.

data.title: MAA Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call
data.description: In Germantown, Tennessee, on April 2, 2026, MAA disclosed its plans to unveil the first quarter 2026 performance figures on April 29, 2026, post market closure. A conference call is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Central Time for further discussion. MAA is listed on NYSE under the symbol MAA.

data.title: Rafay Systems Transforms GPU Providers Into AI Factories By Empowering Them to Monetize Token-Metered Access to AI Models
data.description: Rafay Systems, a prominent infrastructure company based in Sunnyvale, California, has recently introduced advanced features in the Rafay Platform. These new capabilities are specifically designed to cater to AI factories and neocloud operators, enabling them to incorporate a metering and monetization layer. This enhancement allows for the provision of token-based AI services to both enterprises and retail users. The update was announced on April 2, 2026.

data.title: CUPE Alberta slams new library legislation as costly, unworkable, and politically motivated
data.description: A new legislation, Bill 28, has been introduced in Edmonton, AB, which has raised concerns from CUPE Alberta. The bill mandates the physical segregation of specific public library materials and requires parental permission for youths under 16 to borrow them. Applicable to all public libraries in the province, this law limits access to materials intended for adults as well. According to Minister of Public Affairs Dan Williams, books considered too "graphic" by the government will now need this added approval.
PENTAGON: ARMY CHIEF OF STAFF GEN. RANDY GEORGE TO RETIRE EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY

data.title: Trigon Metals Provides Update Regarding the Timing of the Name Change
data.description: Trigon Metals Inc. (TSX-V: TM, OTCPK: PNTZF) based in Toronto, announces a delay in the processing of its application for a short-form vertical amalgamation with Safi Silver Corp., its wholly-owned subsidiary. Corporations Canada cited a backlog in their system as the reason for the delay. The amalgamation, along with the proposed name change to "Safi Silver Corp," was first mentioned in a press release on April 1, 2026. The Company is currently awaiting further updates on the status of the application processing.

data.title: D.A. Davidson Serves as Exclusive Financial Advisor to Pearl Valley Farms on Its Sale to Global Eggs
data.description: In Irvine, California, D.A. Davidson & Co. acted as the exclusive sell-side financial advisor for Pearl Valley Farms in its acquisition by Global Eggs, a major global egg producer and distributor. Pearl Valley, a family-owned egg producer founded in 1987 by the Thompson family, started with 200,000 birds and an egg-packing and cooling facility. This sale marks a significant milestone for Pearl Valley as it transitions into the hands of a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: TerraClear Appoints Eric Rombokas as Director of Robotics and Hardware
data.description: Issaquah, Washington - TerraClear is pleased to share the addition of Eric Rombokas to their leadership team as the new Director of Robotics and Hardware. Rombokas brings more than 15 years of expertise in creating autonomous systems for intricate, undefined settings. This hire is expected to enhance TerraClear's capabilities in innovative technology solutions.

data.title: Centerra Gold Provides Notice of First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call and Details for Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Toronto-based Centerra Gold Inc. will be announcing its first quarter 2026 operating and financial results on April 29, 2026, after market hours. The company, trading under TSX: CG and NYSE: CGAU, is scheduled to hold a conference call and webcast on April 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Investors and interested parties can join the discussion by accessing the details provided below.

data.title: Helmerich & Payne Completes Sale of Utica Square
data.description: Tulsa-based company H&P, Inc. (NYSE: HP) has just finalized the sale of Utica Square, a retail center in Tulsa that it had owned for over 60 years. The property was sold to Northwood Investors, LLC, a private real estate equity firm with holdings nationwide. This sale is a part of H&P's strategy to reduce debt, with the after-tax proceeds surpassing $100 million, as previously announced.

data.title: Starbucks and Boyu Capital Finalize Joint Venture to Accelerate Long Term Growth in China
data.description: In Seattle today, Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) confirmed the completion of its joint venture with Boyu Capital, a move that signifies a major step in the company's strategy for sustainable growth in China. The deal, announced back in November of 2025, underscores Starbucks' commitment to China as a key market for expansion. This partnership aims to strengthen Starbucks' presence in China and boost its growth capabilities.

data.title: Thursday Troubles: S&P 500's Weakest Day Has Cost Investors In Recent Months
data.description: Thursdays have emerged as a troubling day for the market in the past half-year, according to data from Bespoke Investment Group. The S&P 500, tracked by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (ARCA: SPY), has experienced an average decline of 0.54% on Thursdays, the worst performance among all trading days. Meanwhile, Fridays have not performed much better, slipping by an average of 0.08%. In contrast, Monday through Wednesday have all seen average gains. This consistent pattern has caught the attention of traders seeking short-term seasonal trends. Bespoke's six-month data suggests that investors would have been more successful by limiting exposure to the first three days of the week. For more insights, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Google researchers identify six attack categories targeting AI agents, from invisible HTML commands to multi-agent flash crashes.
data.description: A recent research paper from Google DeepMind has identified six different categories of potential attacks on autonomous AI agents. These attacks range from hidden HTML commands to complex multi-agent flash crashes. The paper sheds light on the vulnerabilities faced by AI systems and the need for robust security measures.

data.title: DeFi Technologies Announces Audited Full Year 2025 Financial Results with Record Revenue of $99.1 Million and Record Net Income of $62.7 Million
data.description: DeFi Technologies has achieved exceptional financial results, with annual revenue reaching a record high of $99.1 million and net income and comprehensive income hitting a peak of $62.7 million for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. During the three months ending on December 31, 2025, the company reported revenue...

data.title: Circle, USDC issuer, introduces cirBTC token as wrapped Bitcoin alternative. Enhancing Bitcoin's utility.
data.description: A stablecoin issuer that is publicly traded, Circle, has announced the introduction of a new token called cirBTC. This token serves as the company's version of wrapped Bitcoin, offering users an alternative option.

data.title: Diversified Royalty Corp. Announces April 2026 Cash Dividend
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Diversified Royalty Corp. (TSX: DIV, DIV.DB.A, DIV.DB.B) has been approved by its board of directors to issue a cash dividend of $0.02375 per common share for the month of April 2026. This amount translates to $0.285 annually per common share. Shareholders registered as of April 15, 2026, will receive this dividend on April 30, 2026.

data.title: 2026 Annual General Meeting
data.description: In continuation to the announcement made on March 26, 2026, Golar LNG Limited stated that its 2026 Annual General Meeting is scheduled for May 19, 2026. The Notice of Annual General Meeting and relevant details, such as the Company’s Annual Report on Form 20-F, are available on the Golar LNG Limited website at https://www.golarlng.com. Interested individuals can also access this information through the attachments provided below.
